$comment: c61 (D-CSUBSET-CONTINUE-SKIPS-SWITCH): a `continue` inside a `switch` inside a loop must target the enclosing LOOP, not the switch (C 6.8.6.2 — a switch is a `break` target but transparent to `continue`). DSS rejected it error[H0002] (continue resolves to a switch). SQLite sqlite3VXPrintf (sqlite3.c:33119/33311): a format-char loop switching on the conversion type, `continue` advancing the format string. FIX: continue skips switch frames (verifier drops switches from the target list; MIR skips switch frames in the branchStack). VALUE-CORRECT + SENSITIVE: i==2's `case 2: continue;` must continue the for-loop, SKIPPING the post-switch `acc += 5` — a wrong target (break out of switch) would run +5 and yield 47, not 42. RED-ON-DISABLE: revert -> error[H0002] (does not compile). Pure c-subset -> all 4 targets; pe RUNS on Windows, elf/arm64 RUN on linux/qemu.
